title: Wave-2 🔴: report page state matrix (empty/partial/error/success) + print + section components + axe
acceptance_criteria: Covers the report/[id] PAGE-LEVEL state matrix only (do NOT duplicate the existing performance/compliance/calibration/security report specs — those keep their domain depth): empty (no findings → empty-state), partial (partial blob), error (PSI unavailable/N-A), success (full multi-domain: Security+Performance+Accessibility+SEO sections render with grades). Plus report/[id]/print renders.

Asserts the report-section components are exercised on the page (performance-section, seo-section, accessibility-section, wcag-compliance, grade displays, severity-summary, finding-card, ai-improvement-suggestions, copy-button, pdf-export-button, scan-report/missed-issue-button) — D2 page-driven component coverage; note any that need a seeded variant.

Seed via db-seed.ts seedCompletedScan (T-05) incl. anonymous (userId:null) for the public report; the LoginGateModal blur overlay is present but server-rendered HTML is asserted (per existing architecture note).
report-pages.a11y.spec.ts (R3): axe on the success report view post-stable-state, scoped, WCAG A+AA, @functional, logged allow-list.
Single-tagged per qa-checklist.md; npm run typecheck passes; lists under playwright; no collision with the 4 existing report specs.
output_format: code plus plain English list of which report components are covered here vs already covered by existing specs
